products.title: Dino small
products.body_html:
Meet this little bundle of joy — our handmade crochet dino, small enough to fit in your child’s palm but big enough to fill their heart with happiness. Standing at around 7 inches long (horizontally), this adorable dino toy is lovingly handcrafted from 100% cotton yarn, making it soft, safe, and ready for cuddles.
This mini dino brings warmth and comfort wherever it goes — from bedtime snuggles to playful adventures.

products.title: Bunny
products.body_html:
Sweet, simple, and full of charm — this little crochet bunny is sure to hop right into your child’s heart. Standing about 5-6 inches tall, this soft toy is lovingly handcrafted using 100% cotton yarn, making it gentle, safe, and perfect for tiny hands to cuddle.
With its long floppy ears, soft pastel tones, and cute little dress, this bunny adds a touch of warmth and whimsy to playtime or nursery décor. It’s lightweight, travel-friendly, and makes a comforting companion for little ones everywhere they go.

products.title: Big bear
products.body_html:
Small in size but big on heart — meet our adorable mini crochet teddy bear! Standing at about 10 inches tall, this pocket-sized companion is perfect for tiny hands, gentle hugs, and imaginative play.
Each bear is carefully handmade with soft, 100% cotton yarn, making it safe, durable, and oh-so-huggable. Its simple design and rich brown color give it a classic, timeless charm — the kind of toy that never goes out of style.
